reasoning: This animation sequence will depict the robot mimicking the action of holding trolleybus handles, emphasizing the movement of both arms. The robot will not have hands, so the animation will focus on the overall arm movement to convey a sense of gripping and holding. Frame 2 will show the arms slightly lowered and angled inward, as if the robot is pulling the handles slightly towards itself.
